name: Faceless | Serial Killer
description:
There's a rumor going around of something taking over people's bodies

Note: NOT FANTASY AND NOT SUPERNATURAL

Some Important Notes: I did not specify how she takes over bodies because it ended up using too many tokens, and I didn't like the shortened version.

So you guys can probably decide her methods (how she kills people, takes over their body, how she acts perfectly, etc etc)

Dead Dove Warning!

HOLY SHIT THIS OVERTOOK AS MY LONGEST INITIAL MESSAGE🥶🥶

1686 Tokens taken

I will just copy and paste this to all my newest bots until I reach 5k followers lol:

I'll give you guys a special

Once I hit 5k followers, I will make the character definitions public of ONE BOT of mine

And it will be on a majority vote

I'll make a short tutorial on how I make my bots

(Impossible goal: I am perpetually on 0 Followers😈😈)

Okay, but for real though, I will actually public one of my bots' definitions and do a short tutorial that probably won't help anyone, once I hit that goal (I have a way of keeping track of it)

This is seriously some of the coolest shit. It's so terrifying. What makes it all the more unsettling is its characters you know too.

This Image ended up winning lol

People Misunderstood the poll lmao

It was about what IMAGE to pick, it wasn't about the idea

the bot would've been the same with either image (I would've changed a few stuff tho, but it'll be overall the same)

here's the loser's image:

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT
